Version 1.2.0 — Bug Fixes & Security Improvements

🔐 Authentication & Security Fixes:
• Critical fix: Adding/deleting notifications and news in the admin panel was failing — now fixed
• Fixed admin PIN change functionality that was not working
• Removed legacy insecure code from the community section

🎨 UI Improvements:
• Unified fonts across all app screens for a consistent look

⚡ Performance Fixes:
• Fixed ratings screen stuck in infinite loading when connection fails
• Improved error handling across multiple screens to prevent freezing

🐛 General Fixes:
• Higher stability and better overall user experience
